description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless tank top and loose-fitting jeans. The figure's arms are defined and positioned slightly away from the body, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The jeans are baggy and sit low on the waist, with visible seam details and realistic folds. The figure is wearing closed-toe shoes with a simple, sturdy design. The head is closely cropped, and the facial features are strong and well-defined. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for street or neighborhood environments.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top and loose jeans, standing upright with relaxed arms and closed-toe shoes, styled for a casual urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, sleeveless tank top, relaxed arms, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm definition, profile of the face, and the loose fit of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, broad shoulders, and the baggy jeans from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing arm musculature and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top and loose-fitting jeans
